The App

Every screen, handcrafted

Home — Reading Challenge + Story Feed
Story Detail — Episodes, tags, follow
Reader — Font size, night mode, progress
Poems — Type, language, mood filters
Write — My Stories + Writer Dashboard
Profile — Stats, Settings, Rate Us
In-App Review — Message carousel + clipboard

What's inside

Readers, writers, and the platform
that connects them

📖
Episodic Reading
Continue from last position, track progress per episode, adjustable font size and night mode.
✍️
Writer Studio
Create stories, publish episodes, view per-story analytics — reads, likes, bookmarks.
🌐
9 Indian Languages
Hindi, Marathi, Bengali, Tamil, Telugu, Gujarati and more. Filter by language, category, and mood.
🔔
Real-time Notifications
Firebase FCM for new episodes and activity. Live unread badge on the bell icon.
🛡️
Admin Dashboard
Role-based access. Content moderation tools built into the same app.
📱
Growth Tools
Play In-App Updates, daily review prompt with message carousel, Facebook Audience Network ads.
Tech Stack

Modern Android, no shortcuts

The Team

Two builders, one platform

Pramod Khot
Co-founder · Lead Developer · CreativeAndro

Built KathaKar end-to-end — architecture, UI, backend, DevOps, and growth tooling. The app handles auth, real-time sync, media uploads, moderation, monetisation, and multi-language content discovery. Every screen designed in Compose, every feature built alongside co-founder Nilam.
